title: osp.snapshots (development version)
text: create_protocol() gains dose (dose_unit, default "mg"), start_time (start_time_unit, default "h"), end_time plain arguments Simple-Protocol dosing settings, validated, self-documenting alternative hand-building equivalent InputDose/Start time/End time entries parameters (#157). create_schema() gains plain arguments number_of_repetitions, time_between_repetitions (unit time_between_repetitions_unit, default "h"), start_time (unit start_time_unit, default "h") schema-level repetition parameters, callers longer hand-write create_parameter() entries PK-Sim’s internal names; parameters list still works anything else, supplying value ways error (#167). create_schema_item() gains promoted dose (dose_unit, default "mg") start_time (start_time_unit, default "h") arguments, mirroring create_output_interval() create_event_selection(); dose written single InputDose parameter whose unit selects dose family, supplying promoted argument together matching parameters entry error (#168). fraction_unbound() gains species argument (default "Human", validated ospsuite::Species) now emits Species field fraction-unbound alternative, PK-Sim requires load snapshot (#156). load_snapshot() Snapshot$new() gain upgrade argument (default FALSE) migrates -floor PK-Sim snapshot (Version 74-78) installed core’s version via PK-Sim round trip; without , snapshot reports migrate load (#161). load_snapshot() now supports PK-Sim v13 snapshots (Version 81), reports PK-Sim version, rejects snapshots newer supports (Version 82+) clear error (#161).

title: osp.snapshots (development version)
text: create_population() now requires number_of_individuals whole number 2 10000, matching bounds PK-Sim enforces creating population (#170). create_schema_item() (create_protocol(), Protocol$application_type, SchemaItem$application_type) now validate application_type PK-Sim’s canonical four values (Oral, Intravenous, IntravenousBolus, UserDefined), newly accepting UserDefined longer accepting previously listed non-canonical values (IntravenousInfusion, Intramuscular, Subcutaneous, Dermal, Rectal, Inhalation, Intraperitoneal); target_organ target_compartment now accepted application_type UserDefined (#171). create_snapshot() now authors current PK-Sim v13 snapshot version (Version 81) instead 80, ordering top-level Name Version emitting new CheckNegativeValues solver field simulation added (#161). get_compounds_dfs() longer errors reference-pH solubility alternative whose Reference pH parameter omitted (PK-Sim holds default), defaulting reference pH PK-Sim’s default 7. get_compounds_dfs() longer errors compound parameters read: process empty Parameters list (PK-Sim exports parameterless process GlomerularFiltration) omitted tibbles, compound top-level Parameters (example one built value-object alternative alone) reads back without molecular-weight row. load_snapshot() warns, rather fails, supported snapshot newer installed ospsuite core, since may load run (#161).

title: osp.snapshots 1.0.0
text: AdvancedParameter$distribution_type now validated distribution-type enum (Normal, LogNormal, Uniform, Discrete, Unknown). compound$calculation_methods returns CalculationMethods R6 object instead plain list class compound_calculation_methods. Read names compound$calculation_methods$names mutate $add(name), $remove(name); $length reports count (#30). Compound$is_small_molecule now requires single logical value (NULL). Compound$plasma_protein_binding_partner create_compound()’s plasma_protein_binding_partner argument now validated binding-partner enum (Unknown, Albumin, Glycoprotein). compound$processes returns flat named list Process R6 objects (duplicate names disambiguated _{n}). Filter process$category recover equivalent deprecated per-category accessors (#40). CompoundProperties$calculation_methods now requires character vector (NULL). create_compound(), create_individual(), create_observed_data() take value-object helpers (lipophilicity(), fraction_unbound(), solubility(), intestinal_permeability(), permeability(), age(), weight(), height(), gestational_age(), time(), values(), error()) value/unit/name fields instead per-field _value/_unit/_name scalar arguments; example create_compound(name = "X", lipophilicity = lipophilicity(2.5)). matching Compound/Individual/OriginData fields now require helper well; bare scalar (example individual$age <- 30 compound$lipophilicity <- 2.5) rejected (#133, #140). create_individual() now emits current Disease object ({ Name, Parameters }) OriginData$Disease instead legacy DiseaseState / DiseaseStateParameters pair, matching create_expression_profile(); loaded legacy snapshots still read back correctly (#151). create_parameter() writes identifier data$Name plain parameters (path argument) data$Path path-bearing parameters (path argument). Previously every result carried data$Path. Pass path = ... get path-bearing parameter; pass name = ... get plain one (#52). create_protocol() (Protocol$dosing_interval setter) now validate dosing_interval fixed DosingIntervalId values (Single, DI_6_6_6_6, DI_6_6_12, DI_8_8_8, DI_12_12, DI_24) error early unknown value, matching application_type validated (#151). error() now validates type schema AuxiliaryType values (ArithmeticStdDev, GeometricStdDev, ArithmeticMeanPop, GeometricMeanPop) longer accepts -schema "ArithmeticStdErr" (#151). get_compounds_dfs() returns list two tibbles, properties processes, instead single combined tibble. Update callers df <- get_compounds_dfs(snap) dfs <- get_compounds_dfs(snap); df <- dfs$properties, switch new long-form dfs$processes (#40). identity-name setters across building blocks selections (Compound$name, Population$name, Protocol$name, Schema$name, SchemaItem$name, Event$name/$template, Observer$name, ObserverSet$name, Process$internal_name/$data_source/$molecule/$metabolite/$species, CompoundProperties$name, CompoundGroupSelection$group_name/$alternative_name, CompoundProcessSelection$name/$molecule_name/$metabolite_name/$compound_name/$systemic_process_type, FormulationSelection$name/$key, ObserverSetSelection$name, ProtocolSelection$name, EventSelection$name, Individual$name) now reject empty, NA, non-scalar strings. load_snapshot() now requires PK-Sim v11.2 snapshots newer (Version >= 79). Re-export older projects PK-Sim v11.2+ loading (#52). Observer$dimension now requires non-empty string (NULL). OutputMapping$path, $observed_data, $scaling, $weight, $weights, matching create_output_mapping() arguments, now validated ($scaling/scaling Linear/Log enum setter factory). parameters setters (Protocol$parameters, Individual$parameters, Schema$parameters, SchemaItem$parameters, Formulation$parameters, Event$parameters) now require list (NULL). Parameter$data ExpressionProfile$data now read-; mutate parameter/profile typed fields instead. Parameter$unit now requires single non-empty string (NULL). Population$age_range, $weight_range, $height_range, $gestational_age_range, $bmi_range now validate range’s unit field’s dimension. Population$number_of_individuals now requires positive whole number (previously positive number). Protocol$application_type SchemaItem$application_type now match canonical PK-Sim application types create_protocol() create_schema_item() already validated . Protocol$time_unit create_protocol()’s time_unit argument now validated Time dimension. Simulation$allow_aging now requires single logical value (NULL). SolverSettings fields (abs_tol, rel_tol, use_jacobian, h0, h_min, h_max, mx_step) now validated per create_solver_settings()’s existing rules.

title: osp.snapshots 1.0.0
text: add_simulation() entry point building simulation: snapshot hand constructs Simulation named arguments (name, individual/population, compounds, …), resolves references, derives defaults (calculation methods compound, formulation key protocol’s slot, alternatives group’s default) attaching. Configure compound inline compounds = list(list(name =, protocol =, formulation =, processes =, calculation_methods =, alternatives =, ...)): select specific alternative friendly property name label (alternatives = c(solubility = "FaSSIF"), overriding derived default group ) bind multi-slot protocol’s formulations explicitly (formulation = c(Formulation = "Oral solution", "Formulation 2" = "IV solution")); named formulation map names slot key referenced protocol error, informational message, since PK-Sim rejects unbound mis-bound slot load time. Unresolved references building blocks (individual, population, compounds, events, observer sets, observed data, protocols, formulations) trigger one informational warning per simulation; add proceeds either way (#94, #135, #144). add_*() mutators now accept either single building block list building blocks, mirroring remove_*() accepted character vector names since #66. Success messages sides now uniformly report Added N kind(s) / Removed N kind(s) (#92). add_individual() warns per individual references expression profiles (composite Molecule|Species|Category id) snapshot; add proceeds either way (#135). age(), weight(), height(), gestational_age(), lipophilicity(), fraction_unbound(), solubility(), intestinal_permeability(), permeability(), time(), values(), error() build small value objects bundle value, unit, field-specific extras create_*() factory arguments; owns default unit validates supplied unit field’s dimension. five compound physicochemical-property helpers (lipophilicity(), fraction_unbound(), solubility(), intestinal_permeability(), permeability()) also take default argument mark alternative list group’s default (#133, #147). as_tibbles() converts building-block collection tibble one entry point, returning either bare tibble ("protocols", "observed_data") named list related tibbles (every kind). kind optional accepts character vector: omit (pass NULL) get kinds named list keyed kind, pass several kinds get just subset. nine existing get_*_dfs() functions remain available thin wrappers (#36, #137). compound$calculation_methods individual$origin_data$calculation_methods return CalculationMethods object can inspect ($names, $length) mutate ($add(), $remove()) (#30). compound$processes returns named list Process objects, exposing internal_name, data_source, molecule, metabolite, species, parameters, derived category (#40). create_compound() builds compound named arguments, validation molecular_weight_unit ospsuite::ospUnits$"Molecular weight" (#27, #48). sets physicochemical properties value-object helpers: lipophilicity(), fraction_unbound(), solubility() (expressing reference pH, gain per charge, pH/value table), intestinal_permeability(), permeability(), plus pKa processes; property argument also accepts list objects define several named alternatives, letting exactly one marked group default via helper’s default = TRUE argument (first element default none marked); matching Compound fields $lipophilicity, $fraction_unbound, $solubility, $intestinal_permeability, $permeability writable require helper objects (single list named alternatives) loaded compound can mutated. $pka_types writable list list(type =, value =) entries (raw PkaType list), $processes writable list Process objects (raw process lists). Attach add_compound(), remove name remove_compound() (#39, #115, #133, #140, #144, #147). create_compound_group_selection(), create_compound_process_selection(), create_compound_properties(), create_event_selection(), create_formulation_selection(), create_observer_set_selection(), create_output_interval(), create_output_mapping(), create_output_schema(), create_protocol_selection(), create_solver_settings() build Simulation’s supporting structures named arguments, use escape hatch add_simulation() hand-built configurations (#94). create_descriptor_condition() builds container criterion (Tag, open-string Type "InContainer" "MatchTag") observer’s container criteria (#119). create_event() builds event template name optional list parameter overrides (#27). Attach add_event(), remove remove_event() (#39). create_expression_profile() builds expression profile, requiring molecule, species, category, type, accepts expression (per-organ relative expression data frame container rows raw list) disease (disease state); ExpressionProfile object gains read/write expression disease bindings loaded profile can read mutated (#27, #116). create_formula_reference() builds formula reference (Alias, Path, optional Dimension) observer’s formula (#119). create_formulation() accepts arbitrary FormulationType string raw parameters form (list create_parameter() objects list(Name=, Value=, ...) dicts), can author unknown formulation types set arbitrary parameters name, per-parameter ValueOrigin, custom TableFormula type; curated alias form unchanged Formulation$formulation_type now accepts non-empty string (#120). create_individual() sets demographic fields value-object helpers (age(), weight(), height(), gestational_age()), gains expression_profiles, description, parameters arguments attach expression-profile references, description, localized parameter overrides creation time; Individual$expression_profiles binding now writable new read/write Individual$description binding available. demographic Individual fields require helper objects (#117, #133, #140). create_molecule_list() builds observer’s molecule list for_all, include, exclude (#119). create_observed_data() builds ospsuite::DataSet time(), values(), optional error() series value-object helpers. values dimension required supplied values(), gates unit validation (#27, #48, #133). Attach add_observed_data(), remove remove_observed_data() (#39). create_observer() builds single observer observer set, arguments name, type, dimension, formula, formula references, container criteria, molecule list. Observer now exposes lossless writable container_criteria field (preserving criterion’s Type), writable formula_references field, writable molecule_list field, validates type Amount/Container assignment (#119). create_observer_set() builds observer set name list observers (#43). Attach add_observer_set(), remove remove_observer_set() (#38). create_parameter() gains source_method argument carries value-origin determination method ValueOrigin.Method, round-trips (#151). create_population() builds population, taking Range objects age, weight, height, BMI bounds, accepting description, gestational_age_range, disease_state_parameters, individual composed create_individual() fully configure population’s base individual. number_of_individuals must positive integer; proportion_of_females must length-1 number. Population objects gain read/write description, gestational_age_range, disease_state_parameters bindings read-individual binding exposing base individual (#27, #48, #118). Attach add_population() (#39). create_process() builds compound process; internal_name data_source validated (#40). See ?create_process list supported internal_name values. create_protocol() builds Simple Advanced protocol. Pass schemas build Advanced protocol (accepts Schema objects create_schema() raw lists); mixing Simple-fields (application_type, dosing_interval, …) schemas errors (#27, #48, #54). Attach add_protocol(), remove remove_protocol() (#39). create_schema() create_schema_item() build repeatable blocks individual applications used inside Advanced protocol. application_type schema item validated canonical PK-Sim application types (#54). create_snapshot() creates empty snapshot carrying current supported PK-Sim version, optionally named described, snapshot-level counterpart load_snapshot() export_snapshot() (#112). get_default_alternative() returns name default alternative compound physicochemical-property group, example get_default_alternative(compound$solubility); printing group also flags default alternative (Default) (#147). individual$origin_data returns OriginData object holding demographic starting point individual (species, population, gender, age, weight, height, gestational age, calculation methods, optional disease state) (#30). ObserverSet objects now fully supported end end (load, mutate, convert, export). exposes observers named list Observer objects name, type, dimension, formula (full ExplicitFormula list), formula_expression, formula_dimension, formula_references, container_tags. get_observer_sets_dfs() returns two tibbles (observer_sets set-level rows, observers joinable back via observer_set_id / observer_set_name); observers tibble carries formula_expression, formula_dimension, formula_references columns alongside name, type, dimension, container_tags (#38, #42, #76, #79). protocol$schemas returns named list Schema objects, exposing $items list SchemaItem objects (application type, formulation key, target organ compartment, parameters) (#29). remove_simulation() removes one simulations Snapshot name (#94). Simulation now first-class building block wrapping simulation slice snapshot R6 accessors solver settings, output schemas, compound configurations, event observer-set selections, observed-data references, output mappings, LocalizedParameter overrides. Simulations built add_simulation() loaded snapshots; existing simulations mutated place live bindings. Four post-run fields (Interactions, AlteredBuildingBlocks, IndividualAnalyses, PopulationAnalyses) preserved byte-equivalent $data, construction enforces XOR $individual $population exactly one subject configured (#94). Parameters live parameter tree (Individual, ExpressionProfile, Simulation) now LocalizedParameter objects, identified pipe-separated path. Pre-v11 Applications|... segments migrated Events|... load. create_parameter() routes LocalizedParameter called path argument (#31).

title: osp.snapshots 1.0.0
text: as_tibbles(snapshot, "protocols") (legacy get_protocols_dfs() wrapper) now returns 13 columns whether snapshot protocols . Previously empty-state path returned 18-column tibble disagreed populated path, breaking bind_rows() across mixed snapshots (#56). create_compound() output can now printed is_small_molecule left unset. Previously printing compound aborted “missing value TRUE/FALSE needed”; type line now omitted instead (#115). create_protocol() now validates application_type canonical PK-Sim application types errors early invalid value, matching create_schema_item() (#121). export_snapshot() now serializes DataSet objects attached runtime via add_observed_data(), snapshot built create_observed_data() add_observed_data() round-trips export_snapshot() load_snapshot(). Entries already present loaded snapshot still replayed original JSON slice, means post-load mutations DataSet (e.g. changing xUnit entry snapshot$observed_data) reflected export (#35, #96). loadDataSetFromSnapshot() now preserves observed-data time unit (BaseGrid$Unit) resulting DataSet$xUnit every ospsuite Time unit, including "day(s)", "week(s)", "month(s)", "year(s)", "ks". Previously "h", "min", "s" survived unit silently reverted "h", misplacing time points (example 24x error day(s)); also affected create_observed_data(time_unit = ...) (#104). Parameter$unit validates shape (single non-empty string); dimension-aware unit validation opportunistic since bare Parameter carries dimension. Range$unit remains unvalidated class ; unit validation happens Population range setters consume Range. Population$bmi_range’s unit, Compound$plasma_protein_binding_partner, AdvancedParameter$distribution_type, Formulation curated unit sub-parameters, CompoundProcessSelection$systemic_process_type validated strongest constraint confirmable code; documents fallback (#140). Population$egfr_range now persists population settings, eGFR range set population survives export (#118). print() snapshot$simulations longer errors. Previously aborted simulation_collection kind missing print-dispatch methods, added every building-block collection (#149). remove_expression_profile(), remove_formulation(), remove_individual(), remove_observed_data(), remove_population() now report actual number entries removed instead length input vector, success message reads correctly requested name present snapshot (#66). Building-block collections now share snapshot_collection S3 class single generic print() method. existing per-kind classes (compound_collection, individual_collection, …) preserved marker classes (#34). Observed data removed via remove_observed_data() now dropped exported snapshot. Previously export reused full original ObservedData list whenever lazy cache touched, re-introducing removed entries round-trip. fix applies every building-block section: clearing collection via remove_individual(), remove_formulation(), remove_population(), remove_expression_profile() now writes empty section export instead falling back original entries (#35, #59). Single-element JSON arrays remain arrays export/import, allowing exported snapshots load PK-Sim (#23). eight category-keyed compound accessors ($protein_binding_partners, $metabolizing_enzymes, $hepatic_clearance, $transporter_proteins, $renal_clearance, $biliary_clearance, $inhibition, $induction) soft-deprecated. Use compound$processes (filter process$category) long-form processes tibble returned get_compounds_dfs() (#40).

title: osp.snapshots 0.2.1
text: New osp_models() function browse discover available OSP building block templates OSPSuite Community repository. Fixed bug dataframe generation functions caused errors combining empty NULL building block data using bind_rows().

title: osp.snapshots 0.2.0
text: New load_snapshot() function import PKSIM project snapshots JSON files, URLs, predefined templates. New export_snapshot() function save modified snapshots back JSON files import PKSIM. Complete R6 class implementations major PKSIM building blocks: Individual, Compound, Formulation, Population, Protocol, Event, ExpressionProfile, Parameter. New data frame conversion functions building block types: get_individuals_dfs(), get_compounds_dfs(), get_formulations_dfs(), get_populations_dfs(), get_protocols_dfs(), get_events_dfs(), get_expression_profiles_dfs(), get_observed_data_dfs(). New creation functions: create_individual(), create_formulation(), create_parameter() building new building blocks. New management functions: add_individual(), add_formulation(), add_expression_profile(), remove_individual(), remove_formulation(), remove_population(), remove_expression_profile(). Full integration ospsuite::DataSet objects observed data. Comprehensive input validation species, populations, genders, units. Time conversion utilities OSPSuite R lubridate formats. Structured print methods building block classes.
